title: neoregelia myrmecophila
intro: Neoregelia myrmecophila, also known as the 'Ant Plant', is a type of epiphytic plant that belongs to the bromeliad family. It is native to the tropical regions of South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to contain compounds with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to boost the immune system and reduce the risk of infections. Neoregelia myrmecophila can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
